Name: stemincmonth
Description: Monthly stem volume increment passed from stand model

Name: ggrossmonth
Description: Monthly gross photosynthesis from stand model

Name: greenht
Description: Green crown base height (self-pruning / pruning lift)

Name: crownRatio
Description: Crown width to tree height ratio (dimensionless)

Name: wSx1000
Description: Self-thinning: max stem mass at 1000 stems/ha

Name: performself
Description: Productivity of self-pollinated trees relative to cross-pollinated

Name: seedvar
Description: Coefficient of variation of initial height distribution

Name: monthcstarve
Description: Months of negative carbon balance before tree mortality. NOTE: C# default is 36 (CCabala.cs line 506) but JSON value 80 overwrites it at runtime. Use 80 for Radiata pine.

Name: rowsblock
Description: Number of tree rows per planting block

Name: colsblock
Description: Number of tree columns per planting block
